prompt: Studio product shot of a natural heavy canvas tote bag hanging flat against a neutral warm background with soft shadow, premium catalog lighting, sharp detail. The tote is warm paper white canvas. Screen-printed on the front in bold black type, stacked and centered, reads exactly: 'TEXAS BUILDERS' on top and 'AND GOOD COMPANY' below. Between the two lines sits the orange AITX open-arms mark in AITX orange #ff4201. At the very bottom of the print, a small clean lockup 'AITX x NVIDIA', AITX in orange #ff4201 and NVIDIA wordmark in NVIDIA green #76b900. Visible canvas weave texture, sturdy handles, realistic screen-print ink, minimal and premium.
